To find the total number of square miles in Sandy Bay and Longwood, we need to add the area in square miles for both districts. Sandy Bay has an area of 5.9 square miles, while Longwood has an area of 12.9 square miles. 

Adding these together: 5.9 + 12.9 = 18.8 square miles.
